_description: AC-6 parity fixture: a quiet full session that produces NO exit on either path. Small positive returns, mc held neutral (50 — outside the arm band [5,15) and below the MC sanity threshold but with no stop breach), no VWAP signal (valid_vwap_weight 0). Both the production exit path and the replay must traverse every tick with exit_reason None. This fixture catches a fix that introduces a spurious exit — e.g. an off-by-one in confirm-counting or a mis-wired grace gate that fires an exit where none should occur.
_provenance: Hand-derived input sequence. Schema = synthetic_history tick dict. The parity test asserts the production harness and the replay produce an identical all-None exit-decision sequence.
